welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: Yoruba Action Council
welcome.description: Advancing the progress of the Yoruba nation, preserving cultural traditions, and deploying the professionalism of our members for global Yoruba development.

heritage.title: Preserving
heritage.subtitle: Our Rich Heritage
heritage.description: Celebrating and protecting Yoruba cultural traditions, language, arts, and ancestral wisdom for future generations.

tourism.title: Promoting
tourism.subtitle: Yorubaland Tourism
tourism.description: Showcasing the beauty, history, and vibrant culture of Yorubaland to the world through sustainable tourism initiatives.

education.subtitle: Through Education
education.description: Sponsoring students and building educational infrastructure to create opportunities for Yoruba youth worldwide.

about.heading: Advancing the Yoruba Nation
about.description: Yoruba Action Council (YAC) was incorporated in New Jersey, USA on May 29th, 2018 by like-minded Yoruba professionals to promote Yoruba interest, uphold and enhance our heritage through political and socio-economic rebranding.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To assist in the progress of Yoruba's world and to use our intellects to support the global empowerment of the Yoruba.

unity.title: Unity & Community
unity.description: Working in one accord to empower our people at all levels of society, promoting peace, unity, love, and prosperity.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Operating as a link between the Yoruba Nation, the diaspora, and global interaction for worldwide development.

cultural.title: Cultural Preservation
cultural.description: Promoting and supporting Yoruba cultural traditions, preventing our rich heritage from extinction through research.

pledge.title: Our Solemn Pledge
pledge.intro: We, the descendants of the Yoruba, desiring to promote the interests and welfare of the Yoruba globally...
items: Committed to transparency with a great sense of justice and honesty
Exceptionally committed to excellence in upholding our heritage
The youth shall occupy a prime position in all our efforts

events.label: Events
events.title: Get Involved in Events
events.description: Come and take part in our events for the Yoruba's growth and the advancement of its institutions. Together, we can make a lasting impact.

donate.label: Support Us
donate.title: Together, Let's Make Change Happen
donate.description: Your generous contribution helps us continue our mission of advancing the Yoruba nation, supporting education, and preserving our cultural heritage.

footer.description: A 501(c)(3) non-profit organization promoting the heritage, welfare, and progress of the Yoruba people globally since 2018.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Yoruba Action Council. All rights reserved.

membership.title: YAC Membership
membership.subtitle: Join the Yoruba Advocacy Council and become part of a global movement dedicated to advancing the progress of Yoruba descendants worldwide.
membership.introLabel: Membership of the Yoruba Action Council
membership.introText1: The Yoruba Action Council is a 501(c)3 organization set up and registered in New Jersey, United States of America, dedicated to advancing the progress of Yoruba descendants globally.
membership.introText2: As a member, you become part of a vibrant community committed to cultural preservation, economic empowerment, and the advancement of Yoruba interests worldwide.
membership.objectivesSubtitle: As a YAC member, you commit to supporting these 15 core objectives
membership.categoriesSubtitle: YAC offers various membership categories to welcome all Yoruba descendants
infoItems: Membership for ANYAM and AYM categories may be obtained only through referral by a minimum of two foundation members affirming the individual as an honorable Yoruba descendant by birth or marriage.
The YAC registration fee is a one-time payment required of all members except the honorary members.
Annual fees and other financial obligations may be levied to all categories of the YAC membership as may be determined from time to time by the YAC executive and ratified by the YAC membership.
membership.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and our membership team will contact you
membership.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about yourself and why you want to join YAC...
membership.contactText: If you have any questions about membership or need assistance with your application, please don't hesitate to reach out.

leadership.title: Leadership & Board
leadership.subtitle: Meet the dedicated individuals who guide YAC's mission to advance the progress of the Yoruba nation and preserve our rich cultural heritage.
leadership.ctaText: We're always looking for dedicated individuals to join our cause. Together, we can make a lasting impact on the Yoruba community worldwide.

donate.impactText2: From educational scholarships to community development projects, your generosity enables us to create meaningful change in the lives of Yoruba people across the globe.

tourism.title: Discover the Beauty of
tourism.subtitle: Experience the rich history, vibrant culture, and breathtaking landscapes of Yoruba heritage destinations. Our tourism initiative connects visitors with authentic cultural experiences while supporting local communities.
tourism.whatWeOfferSubtitle: Our tourism program provides comprehensive experiences that celebrate and preserve Yoruba culture.

heritageSites.title: Heritage Sites
heritageSites.description: Explore ancient palaces, sacred groves, and historical landmarks that tell the story of the Yoruba people.

culturalExperiences.title: Cultural Experiences
culturalExperiences.description: Immerse yourself in festivals, traditional ceremonies, and authentic Yoruba cultural events.

guidedTours.title: Guided Tours
guidedTours.description: Join our organized tours led by knowledgeable guides who bring history to life.

communityImpact.title: Community Impact
communityImpact.description: Your visit supports local communities and helps preserve cultural heritage for future generations.

tourism.destinationsSubtitle: Explore these remarkable locations that showcase the depth and beauty of Yoruba heritage.

osunOsogbo.description: UNESCO World Heritage Site celebrating the river goddess

idanreHills.description: Spectacular natural wonder with rich cultural significance

tourism.ctaText: Join us in promoting and preserving the rich cultural heritage of the Yoruba people through sustainable tourism.

education.title: Empowering Through
education.subtitle: Education is the foundation of progress. Our sponsorship program provides financial support, resources, and mentorship to help Yoruba students achieve their academic dreams and become future leaders.
education.programsSubtitle: We offer comprehensive educational support through multiple programs designed to address different needs and stages of academic development.

scholarships.title: Scholarships
scholarships.description: Full and partial scholarships for deserving students from primary school through university level.

materials.title: Educational Materials
materials.description: Providing textbooks, school supplies, and learning resources to students in need.

meritAwards.title: Merit Awards
meritAwards.description: Recognizing and rewarding academic excellence to motivate continued success.

mentorship.title: Mentorship Programs
mentorship.description: Connecting students with professionals for guidance and career development.

education.howToHelpSubtitle: Your contribution directly impacts a student's life and future. Here's how the sponsorship process works:

choose.title: Choose Your Level
choose.desc: Select a sponsorship tier that fits your capacity

match.title: Match with a Student
match.desc: We connect you with a student who needs support

track.title: Track Progress
track.desc: Receive updates on your sponsored student's achievements

impact.title: See the Impact
impact.desc: Witness the transformation your support creates

education.ctaText: Every donation, no matter the size, helps a student move closer to their dreams. Join us in building the future leaders of the Yoruba nation.

culture.title: Celebrating Our
culture.subtitle: Our cultural promotion initiative works to preserve, celebrate, and share the rich traditions of the Yoruba people. From language and music to art and ceremonies, we ensure our heritage thrives for generations to come.
culture.initiativesSubtitle: We work across multiple fronts to ensure the Yoruba cultural heritage remains vibrant and accessible.

music.title: Traditional Music & Dance
music.description: Preserving and teaching traditional Yoruba music, drumming, and dance forms to new generations.

language.title: Language Preservation
language.description: Developing resources and programs to teach and maintain the Yoruba language globally.

arts.title: Arts & Crafts
arts.description: Supporting traditional artisans and promoting Yoruba art forms including adire, sculptures, and beadwork.

events.title: Cultural Events
events.description: Organizing festivals, conferences, and celebrations that bring the community together.

culture.whyMattersSubtitle: Culture is the foundation of identity. As Yoruba people spread across the globe, maintaining our cultural connections becomes increasingly vital. Our initiatives ensure that:
preservationReasons: Future generations understand their roots and heritage
Traditional knowledge and practices are documented and preserved
The Yoruba language remains alive and evolving
Artists and craftspeople can continue their traditional work
Our community stays connected across geographical boundaries
culture.upcomingEventsSubtitle: Join us at our upcoming cultural events and celebrations.
culture.ctaTitle: Be Part of Our Cultural Legacy
culture.ctaText: Help us preserve and promote the rich cultural heritage of the Yoruba people. Your support makes a lasting difference.

water.title: Bringing Clean Water to
water.subtitle: Access to clean water is a fundamental human right. Our borehole project provides sustainable water solutions to underserved communities across Yorubaland, transforming lives and enabling development.
water.approachSubtitle: We take a comprehensive approach to water access, ensuring sustainability and community ownership.

cleanWater.title: Clean Water Access
cleanWater.description: Providing safe, clean drinking water to communities that previously lacked access.

strategicLocations.title: Strategic Locations
strategicLocations.description: Installing boreholes in areas with the greatest need and maximum community impact.

communityTraining.title: Community Training
communityTraining.description: Teaching local communities how to maintain and manage their water systems.

maintenance.title: Ongoing Maintenance
maintenance.description: Providing continued support and maintenance to ensure long-term functionality.

water.locationsSubtitle: We strategically select communities based on need, population, and potential impact. Here are some of our current and planned projects:
water.howToHelpSubtitle: Your contribution directly impacts communities in need. Here's what your donation can accomplish:

donationTiers.impact: Provides water access for a family for 10 years

water.ctaTitle: Help Us Bring Water to Those in Need
water.ctaText: Every donation brings us closer to providing clean water access to another community. Join us in making a lasting difference.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about the Yoruba Action Council, membership, donations, and our projects.

q1.question: What is the Yoruba Action Council (YAC)?
q1.answer: The Yoruba Action Council (YAC) is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization incorporated in New Jersey, USA on May 29th, 2018. We are dedicated to advancing the progress of Yoruba descendants globally, preserving cultural traditions, and deploying the professionalism of our members for global Yoruba development.

q2.question: Where is YAC located?
q2.answer: YAC is headquartered in New Jersey, United States. Our mailing address is P.O. Box 3073, East Orange, NJ 07019. However, we operate globally and have members across multiple continents.

q3.question: Is YAC a tax-exempt organization?
q3.answer: Yes, YAC is a registered 501(c)(3) tax-exempt organization. All donations made to YAC are tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. Donors will receive a tax receipt for their records.

q4.question: How can I contact YAC?
q4.answer: You can reach us by email at info@yacworldwide.org, by phone at +1 (862) 250-1791, or through our contact form on the Contact Us page. Our office hours are Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST.

q1.question: Who can become a member of YAC?
q1.answer: Membership is open to all Yoruba descendants by birth or marriage who share our vision of advancing the Yoruba nation. We welcome members from all professions and backgrounds who are committed to our mission.

q2.question: What are the membership categories?
q2.answer: YAC offers several membership categories: Foundation Members, ANYAM (Associate National Yoruba Assembly Members), AYM Senior (Aged 50+), AYM Regular (Under 50), Student Senior (18-25), Student Junior (Under 18), and Honorary Members. Each category has different requirements and benefits.

q3.question: Is there a membership fee?
q3.answer: Yes, there is a one-time registration fee required for all members except honorary members. Annual fees and other financial obligations may be determined by the YAC executive and ratified by the membership.

q4.question: How do I apply for membership?
q4.answer: You can apply for membership by visiting our Membership page and filling out the registration form. For ANYAM and AYM categories, you will need a referral from at least two foundation members who can affirm your Yoruba heritage.

q1.question: How can I donate to YAC?
q1.answer: You can donate through our website's Donate page. We accept various payment methods. You can choose from preset donation amounts or enter a custom amount that works for you.

q2.question: Where does my donation go?
q2.answer: Your donations support our four main project areas: Educational Sponsorship (scholarships and school support), Water Borehole Projects (clean water access), Cultural Promotion (preserving Yoruba heritage), and Tourism Promotion (showcasing Yorubaland).

q3.question: Can I donate to a specific project?
q3.answer: Yes, you can designate your donation to a specific project. When making your donation, you can indicate which initiative you'd like to support, whether it's education, water, culture, or tourism.

q4.question: Are there other ways to support YAC besides donating?
q4.answer: Absolutely! You can support YAC by volunteering your time and skills, becoming a member, spreading awareness about our mission, participating in our events, or exploring corporate partnership opportunities.

faq.ctaText: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our team is here to help. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
